notes.text: You can now use a controller extension hook to react to event-driven side effects received using a WebSocket
We now dynamically adjust the decimal padding for currencies based on the currency codelist
We now support merging cells in responsive tables
We now correctly recreate empty rows after executing side effects
We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation used an incorrect value for fields with the TextOnly text arrangement
We now ensure that the type-ahead functionality is correctly triggered after inline row creation when a message dialog is open
We now pass the openInNewTab property to the onBeforeNavigation hook to ensure correct navigation handling when users click 'Open in New Tab'
Table sorting now works correctly when variantManagement is set to None
You can now override the inputFormat of date fields for data exports from the Table building block
We’ve resolved an issue where analytical tables failed to load when UpdateRestrictions pointed to a navigation property
We now correctly display error messages that occur during object creation
We've resolved an issue where clicking Create failed after navigating back from create mode to a list report page with inline edit
